roundup.title: Gemma 4 QAT Lands, Agent Stacks Mature
roundup.subtitle: Gemma 4 QAT 发布，Agent 框架与记忆层集体升级
headline: @googleaidevs 与 @HuggingPapers 同步推送 Gemma 4 QAT 权重，Ollama 与 vLLM 内存占用显著下降，本地与移动端部署门槛降低。@ollama 同时上线对应量化版本，开发者可直接拉取实验。
@claudeai 把 Claude Cowork 使用限额翻倍，@GoogleResearch 发布多代理 RAG 框架，@NousResearch 推出 Hermes Agent v0.16.0 桌面 UI，三方共同指向 Agent 生产力工具的快速成熟。
@SakanaAILabs 宣布成立 RSI Lab，专注递归自改进，@perplexity_ai 上线 Nemotron 3 Ultra 长时 Agent 模型，@ScaleAILabs 同期评测五款生产 Agent 栈，行业注意力从单模型转向 Agent 编排与评估。

deepDives.title: Gemma 4 QAT 量化模型全渠道上线
deepDives.summary: Google 发布 Gemma 4 系列 QAT 优化权重，显著降低推理内存，同时保持接近 bfloat16 精度。

facts.text: Gemma 4 QAT 权重已登陆 Hugging Face、Ollama 与 Google AI Studio，支持 GGUF Q4_0 与移动端 <1GB schema。
facts.quote: Gemma 4 Quantization-Aware Training (QAT) weights are now available on Ollama!

facts.text: Unsloth 动态 GGUF 恢复大部分精度，26B-A4B 模型从 85.6% 回升。

bullish.text: 本地与移动端部署门槛大幅降低，值得立即尝鲜

bullets.text: Claude Cowork 限额翻倍，支持更复杂多代理任务委派
LangChain create_agent 支持 middleware 定制最小 harness
Weaviate Engram GA，提供 fire-and-forget 长期记忆服务
Nemotron 3 Ultra 在 GPQA Diamond 达 86.1%、MMLU Pro 85.8%
bullets.quote: 86.1% on GPQA Diamond, 85.8% on MMLU Pro

bullets.text: Tencent Hy-Memory 让长期协作 Agent 减少 70%+ 记忆，token 下降 35%
bullets.quote: 70%+ fewer memories, 45%+ higher info density, 35% less token usage

bullets.text: Sakana AI 成立 RSI Lab，统一 LLM² 与 Darwin Gödel Machine 等自改进成果
NitroGen 获 CVPR Best Paper Honorable Mention，推进具身多物理模拟

topTweets.author: @googleaidevs
topTweets.text: Gemma 4 QAT 权重正式开源，支持消费级 GPU 与移动端本地运行
topTweets.whyItMatters: QAT 模型降低部署成本，AI 工程师可快速本地验证

topTweets.author: @SakanaAILabs
topTweets.text: 宣布成立 RSI Lab，专注递归自改进 AI 研究
topTweets.whyItMatters: 下一代自主 AI 基础设施级布局信号

topTweets.author: @claudeai
topTweets.text: Claude Cowork 使用限额翻倍，适合委派更复杂任务
topTweets.whyItMatters: 直接提升多代理工作流生产力上限

topTweets.author: @perplexity_ai
topTweets.text: Nemotron 3 Ultra 上线，专为长时 Agent 设计
topTweets.whyItMatters: 开源长上下文 Agent 模型新选择

topTweets.author: @danielhanchen
topTweets.text: Unsloth 动态 GGUF 恢复 Gemma 4 QAT 精度损失
topTweets.whyItMatters: 给出可复现的量化部署优化路径

takeaways: Gemma 4 QAT 权重已全渠道可用，AI 工程师可立即在本地与边缘设备验证量化效果。
Agent 记忆与沙箱基础设施（Engram、Harbor、Weaviate）进入 GA 阶段，生产部署条件成熟。
多代理 RAG 与 workflow 框架持续迭代，重点关注 token 效率与失败恢复机制。
NVIDIA 与 Google 开源模型均针对长时 Agent 优化，推理成本曲线正在快速下探。

items.author: @swyx
items.text: a smarter alternative to "always use plan mode": always frame your task as a question, so that the model is invited to push back...
items.whyItMatters: 简单prompt技巧让模型主动反馈，优化Agent任务执行质量。

items.author: @HuggingPapers
items.text: Google just released a QAT-optimized Gemma 4 31B model on Hugging Face Dramatically lower memory for vLLM Preserving near-bfloat16 quality
items.whyItMatters: Gemma 4 31B QAT优化发布，vLLM推理内存大幅降低

items.author: @emollick
items.text: This chart from Anthropic is useful, since Agent Teams and Workflows are both very new and very powerful (and token hungry). On the other hand, maybe it doesn't matter as a lot of the decisions about which approach to use is from the AI itself & it often uses them in combination
items.whyItMatters: Anthropic Agent Teams vs Workflows对比

items.author: @tszzl
items.text: registering my prediction with my outsider insider knowledge that it’s a really strong model
items.whyItMatters: 内部人士对新模型强度的预测信号

items.author: @NousResearch
items.text: Hermes Agent v0.16.0 - “The Surface Release” Changelog below:
items.whyItMatters: 开源Agent框架新版本发布，支持桌面中文UI，AI工程师可直接试用。

items.author: @perplexity_ai
items.text: Nemotron 3 Ultra is now available for Pro and Max subscribers on Perplexity and Computer. It's @nvidia's new open model built for long-running agents.
items.whyItMatters: NVIDIA新开源模型上线Perplexity，专为长时Agent优化，工程师可立即测试。

items.author: @claudeai
items.text: We've doubled usage limits in Claude Cowork for the next month. Delegate bigger, more complex tasks to Claude.
items.whyItMatters: Claude Cowork限额翻倍，AI工程师可处理更复杂多Agent任务。

items.author: @ollama
items.text: Gemma 4 Quantization-Aware Training (QAT) weights are now available on Ollama! They reduce memory requirements while maintaining model quality.
items.whyItMatters: Gemma 4 QAT模型上线Ollama，本地部署内存更低，适合工程师快速实验。

items.author: @sydneyrunkle
items.text: why should you give your agent a sandbox? giving an agent code execution power allows it to solve problems more creatively...
items.whyItMatters: Agent沙箱执行指南，提升创造力与效率，LangChain实践参考。

items.author: @SakanaAILabs
items.text: Building AI that Builds AI: Introducing the Sakana AI RSI Lab 🚀 https://sakana.ai/rsi-lab/ Today, we are announcing the Sakana AI Recursive Self-Improvement (RSI) Lab... unifying breakthroughs like LLM², Darwin Gödel Machine, The AI Scientist... building open-ended, adaptive architectures that collectively self-improv
items.whyItMatters: 递归自改进AI实验室成立，奠定下一代自主AI基础

items.author: @GoogleResearch
items.text: Introducing our new agentic RAG framework. A collab with Google Cloud, our multi-agent workflow goes beyond standard RAG by breaking down complex enterprise queries & iteratively searching for sufficient context before generating dependable responses. 📜→https://research.google/blog/unlocking-dependable-responses-with-
items.whyItMatters: 多代理RAG框架发布，提升企业级可靠响应能力

items.author: @OpenRouter
items.text: Live on OpenRouter: Riverflow 2.5 from @riverflow_ai. The first image model with an independent scoring rubric you control to guide its thinking and editing, with controllable reasoning effort to trade speed for quality. Free until Tuesday June 9. Fast and Pro below 🧵
items.whyItMatters: 新图像模型上线，支持可控推理与评分 rubric，免费试用至 6/9

items.author: @GeminiApp
items.text: You can now create and edit images directly in Gemini Live. Whether testing out room decor, getting help with math, or creating shareable memes, it all happens in real-time. Just open the Gemini app, tap the Live button, share your camera, and tell Gemini what you want to see.
items.whyItMatters: Gemini Live 实时图像生成编辑上线，提升多模态交互体验

items.author: @SemiAnalysis_
items.text: Nobody is asking who makes the <$1 multi-layer ceramic capacitor (MLCC) that keeps voltage stable across every chip in the rack, that every AI server needs tens of thousands of, that has long extended lead times, and going through an unprecedented price hike. AI server MLCC demand is growing ~5x by CY27.
items.whyItMatters: AI 服务器 MLCC 瓶颈与 5x 需求增长，供应链风险信号

items.author: @github
items.text: The way we build software has changed. Again. Good thing developers love learning new tricks. GitHub Universe is back to help you navigate the age of AI agents. https://github.blog/news-insights/company-news/github-universe-is-back-all-together-now-in-the-agentic-era/
items.whyItMatters: GitHub Universe 回归，聚焦 AI Agent 时代开发者工具与实践

items.author: @DrJimFan
items.text: NitroGen just won CVPR Best Paper Honorable Mention!! We are making strides towards general-purpose embodied agents that master not only the real world physics, but also all possible physics across a multiverse of simulations.
items.whyItMatters: NVIDIA具身智能NitroGen获CVPR荣誉

items.author: @danielhanchen
items.text: Gemma-4 QAT just dropped! We found if you naively convert from QAT Q4_0 BF16, you will lose accuracy since the conversion to llama.cpp has a different lattice. Unsloth dynamic GGUFs recovers most of it! 26B-A4B: 85.6% top-1 % from 70.2% (+15.4%)
items.whyItMatters: Gemma 4 QAT+Unsloth GGUF优化发布

items.author: @MiniMax_AI
items.text: Excited to bring M3 to more developers through @dgrid_ai 🤝 Frontier coding, native multimodality, and 1M-token context — now available on DGrid.
items.whyItMatters: MiniMax M3模型上线DGrid，1M上下文

items.author: @turbopuffer
items.text:
new: rerank_by

before, you'd implement rank fusion client-side. now, a little QoL upgrade, especially nice for large result sets

docs: https://turbopuffer.com/docs/query
items.whyItMatters: 搜索后处理优化，提升RAG与Agent检索效率

items.author: @wandb
items.text:
To test an AI agent, you run it in a sandbox: a throwaway cloud machine where it does the real work.

Harbor, the framework most top labs use to run those tests, just added CoreWeave Sandboxes as an option.

Switching takes one line of code.
items.whyItMatters: Agent测试沙箱框架更新，简化大规模Agent评估部署

items.author: @googleaidevs
items.text: New @GoogleGemma 4 QAT (Quantization-Aware Training) checkpoints are here, so you can run models locally on consumer GPUs and mobile devices with minimal quality loss. GGUF (Q4_0), Custom Mobile Schema <1GB, open weights on HF.
items.whyItMatters: Gemma 4 本地量化部署，消费级 GPU/移动端实用

items.author: @googleaidevs
items.text: Download the weights on @HuggingFace today. https://huggingface.co/collections/google/gemma-4-qat-q4-0
items.whyItMatters: Gemma 4 QAT 权重开源，立即可用

items.author: @maximelabonne
items.text: We released two new specialized VLMs 🎉 They extract structured outputs from images quickly and reliably. You can customize your fields directly in the system prompt. > Two sizes: 1.6B parameters and 450M > open-weight > run on any device SoC
items.whyItMatters: 开源小模型实现图像到结构化JSON提取，适合边缘部署

items.author: @robotsdigest
items.text: Human data might be the missing ingredient for scaling robot learning. Ego-Pi shows that a VLA fine-tuned on both robot and egocentric human data can learn task semantics that never appear in robot demonstrations...
items.whyItMatters: Ego-Pi用人类视频数据提升机器人任务学习，混合数据新范式

items.author: @TencentHunyuan
items.text: Tencent Hy... open-source PlanningBench - a scalable, verifiable framework for evaluating and training LLM planning capabilities. 30+ real-world planning tasks, Automated verification.
items.whyItMatters: 开源PlanningBench，LLM规划能力评测训练新基准

items.author: @testingcatalog
items.text: OPENAI 🔥: ChatGPT now can send emails directly from the conversation! AI will wrap whole Internet 👀
items.whyItMatters: ChatGPT原生邮件发送功能上线，Agent能力扩展

items.author: @Wauplin
items.text: Important safety fix: on Lustre, GPFS, and some NFS mounts, file locking silently fails... Downloads now always use a fresh temp file. Full release notes: https://github.com/huggingface/huggingface_hub/releases/tag/v1.18.0
items.whyItMatters: Hugging Face Hub v1.18安全修复，提升本地缓存可靠性

items.author: @cohere
items.text: Proud to announce that Cohere has been awarded first place in NATO’s Agentic AI for Cognitive Warfare Innovation Challenge. The competition highlighted the growing role of agentic AI in helping democratic nations understand, anticipate and respond to information threats.
items.whyItMatters: Cohere Agentic AI 获 NATO 创新挑战赛第一，验证企业级 Agent 应用

items.author: @AndrewYNg
items.text: New course on serving LLMs efficiently -- how do you serve models to many concurrent users at low latency and reasonable cost? This short course is built with @RedHat and taught by @cedricclyburn. Efficient LLM serving requires efficient memory management... Join and learn to serve LLMs efficiently:
items.whyItMatters: vLLM+量化实用部署教程，AI工程师必学

items.author: @JeffDean
items.text: Check out our Gemma 4 12B model: it's a super capable open weights model that can run directly on your laptop.
items.whyItMatters: Gemma 4 12B开源笔记本可跑模型发布

items.author: @julien_c
items.text: Today I'm launching a new project called SynthTraces 🔥 It is a minimal codebase to generate synthetic coding agent session traces using Pi (from @badlogicgames) ... The result is more than 2,000 Pi session traces which can be used to train or fine-tune LLMs, and optimize them for Pi 🤯 And ofc everything is published
items.whyItMatters: 开源合成 coding agent traces，助模型优化

items.author: @LangChain_OSS
items.text: One of the most common questions we get from agent builders is how to make agents resilient to failures, so we wrote a guide!
items.whyItMatters: LangChain 发布 agent 容错指南

items.author: @turbopuffer
items.text:
new: branching

create an instant, copy-on-write clone of a tpuf namespace

→ constant-time (440ms p50, ~1s p99)
→ fully independent
→ unlimited branches, unlimited branch depth

docs: https://turbopuffer.com/docs/branching
items.whyItMatters: 向量数据库核心功能升级，支持AI应用快速实验与回滚

items.author: @AssemblyAI
items.text: Everything we shipped in May, in 2 minutes. Follow the changelog for more: https://www.assemblyai.com/changelog
items.whyItMatters: AssemblyAI 5 月产品更新速览

items.author: @ValsAI
items.text: Nemotron 3 Ultra is solid across general reasoning: 86.1% on GPQA Diamond, 85.8% on MMLU Pro, and 82.1% on LegalBench, landing 5th to 7th among open weight models.
items.whyItMatters: NVIDIA新模型基准详解，开放权重模型排名参考

items.author: @hwchase17
items.text: langchain create_agent is a super minimal agent harness very easy to customize with... middleware!!!
items.whyItMatters: LangChain最小Agent harness更新，支持middleware定制，快速构建任务特定流程。

items.author: @demishassabis
items.text: Celebrating the milestone of a massive 150+ million downloads of Gemma 4 with the release of the new Gemma 4 12B model! It's incredibly powerful for such a small model and it’s tiny enough to run locally on a laptop with just 16GB VRAM. Apache 2.0 license - happy building!
items.whyItMatters: Gemma 4 12B发布，1.5亿下载里程碑，本地高效运行

items.author: @ClaudeDevs
items.text: How do we automate business analytics with Claude? New blog post covering our best practices for skills, data foundations, and evaluations when building agents to perform data analysis: https://claude.com/blog/how-anthropic-enables-self-service-data-analytics-with-claude
items.whyItMatters: Claude代理构建商业分析最佳实践发布

items.author: @ClaudeDevs
items.text: We've changed the trigger word from "workflow" to "ultracode". You can still say "use a workflow for this", but when you're clearly referring to something else, Claude won't kick off a dynamic workflow. For an explicit trigger, use "ultracode".
items.whyItMatters: Claude Code动态工作流触发词更新，提升精准控制

items.author: @weaviate_io
items.text: Engram is now GA. Managed memory service built on Weaviate that actively maintains memory instead of just storing it. Fire-and-forget API, topics as memory magnets, scopes for isolation, composable pipelines. $75 credits for first 3 months if sign up before July 15.
items.whyItMatters: Agent 长期记忆基础设施 GA，支持异步管道与隔离，解决生产级遗忘问题

items.author: @HamelHusain
items.text: Our evals course is 25% off this week! The next cohort will have completely refreshed material. @sh_reya and I will cover new topics like: using agents for evals (w/o the foot guns), thinking like a data scientist, optimization approaches for harnesses and more.
items.whyItMatters: Evals课程更新，含Agent评估实践

items.author: @kellerjordan0
items.text: Modded-NanoGPT optimization result #29 (2026/05/14): @eliebakouch has achieved a new step-count record of 2930 via the following techniques: - Add Aurora to mlp.proj - Warmup & cooldown Muon mu ...
items.whyItMatters: NanoGPT 优化新纪录，具体训练技巧

items.author: @MParakhin
items.text: We just published a paper on nitty-gritty technical SimGym details. Come and chat with us at ICML - DeepMind/Cornell/Stanford workshop. https://arxiv.org/pdf/2605.16116
items.whyItMatters: SimGym 技术论文发布，ICML 讨论

items.author: @MParakhin
items.text: And I was right! Toloka Arena finished testing - Claude 4.8 did take the first place. And, just as I saw, it did so through higher reasoning budgets - look at the number of tokens used.
items.whyItMatters: Claude 4.8 登顶 Toloka Arena，token 用量细节

items.author: @__tinygrad__
items.text: Because it's the full stack from Tensors to MMIO, the ceiling on speed in tinygrad is higher than in any other framework.
items.whyItMatters: 全栈GPU框架性能上限讨论，影响本地/边缘AI推理选择

items.author: @AssemblyAI
items.text: @dan_aai is running a live workshop on building a voice agent with Claude Code on June 10 at 10am PT. Starter code, working agent, mental model.
items.whyItMatters: Claude Code 构建语音 Agent 实战 workshop

items.author: @poolsideai
items.text: Laguna M.1 is #1 on @kilocode today. Good to see Laguna getting put to work.
items.whyItMatters: Poolside Laguna M.1登顶coding leaderboard，agentic coding实力验证

items.author: @OpenAINewsroom
items.text: There’s real momentum right now for AI safety policy. Yesterday’s EO on cyber was an important step forward. We’re proposing a set of ideas for policymakers to consider next and to put the US out in front on frontier safety. https://openai.com/index/frontier-safety-blueprint/
items.whyItMatters: OpenAI发布前沿安全政策蓝图，影响AI监管与安全实践

items.author: @btaylor
items.text: Here's a great case study of Sierra's work with GoFundMe, who used Sierra to create a coach to help guide people through the process of creating a fundraiser. We estimate the agent will result in $125 million in additional help raised in the U.S. this year alone.
items.whyItMatters: 真实 Agent 案例，预计带来 1.25 亿美元影响

items.author: @OpenAINewsroom
items.text: Codex now has more than 5M weekly active users. But the bigger story is what people are using it for: not just writing code, but getting more work done across research, analysis, content, and operations. Our new report on how Codex is becoming a productivity tool for knowledge work:
items.whyItMatters: Codex用户破500万，报告展示从代码到知识工作生产力转变

items.author: @poolsideai
items.text: Love seeing the work @RedHat_AI and @vllm_project are doing to make Laguna XS.2 easier to run. Red Hat AI trained a DFlash speculator: a 0.6B drafter that predicts 8 tokens per pass... With vLLM support and FP8/NVFP4/INT4 checkpoints...
items.whyItMatters: 33B MoE Laguna XS.2获vLLM+speculator优化，推理加速落地

items.author: @GoogleAIStudio
items.text: getting started with managed agents in the gemini api: an inside look with @OfficialLoganK, @_philschmid, and @alihcevik
items.whyItMatters: Gemini API 托管 Agent 实战教程，加速企业级 Agent 开发

items.author: @AndrewYNg
items.text: One of the new, buzzy jobs in Silicon Valley is the AI Forward Deployed Engineer (FDE)... However, I believe the number of AI Engineer jobs will be far larger... Skilled AI Engineers are in very high demand!
items.whyItMatters: AI Engineer vs FDE角色对比，职业规划参考

items.author: @TheAITimeline
items.text:
Learn from your own latents and not from tokens: A sample-complexity theory

Latent prediction architectures learn from internal representations rather than token-level targets, enabling sample complexity that is constant in tree depth L compared to the exponential requirements...
items.whyItMatters: 潜在空间预测理论，降低模型训练数据需求

items.author: @TheAITimeline
items.text:
LocateAnything: Fast and High-Quality Vision-Language Grounding with Parallel Box Decoding

Trained on 138M high-quality samples, LocateAnything decodes bounding boxes in parallel instead of one coordinate at a time...
items.whyItMatters: 视觉 grounding 新模型，并行解码提升Agent感知速度

items.author: @nvidia
items.text: Sovereign AI at population scale isn’t theory anymore, it’s shipping. Sarvam AI is building a full-stack, “Made in India” AI platform that: 🧠 Trains 100B+ parameter MoE models efficiently across 4,096+ NVIDIA H100 GPUs ⚡ Delivers millisecond-level, multilingual voice inference for Aadhaar 📞 Powers automated KYC, sale
items.whyItMatters: 展示大规模主权AI落地案例，H100集群+语音Agent实践

items.author: @ScaleAILabs
items.text: We evaluated five production agent stacks: Codex, Claude Code, Google Antigravity, ADK, and OpenCode, with and without customization and skill tuning. Even with the best enhancements, agents still struggle to escalate to humans at the right moment. State-of-the-art agents remain far from reliable human collaboration.
items.whyItMatters: 实测5大Agent框架人机协作瓶颈，指导可靠Agent构建

items.author: @TencentHunyuan
items.text: 🚀We’re excited to officially release Hy-Memory — a powerful memory plugin built specifically for long-term collaborative Agents like OpenClaw. ... 70%+ fewer memories, 45%+ higher info density, 35% less token usage.
items.whyItMatters: Agent长期记忆插件发布，显著降低token消耗
